jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - T.I.M.E. - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Join the T.I.M.E. family as a Senior Teacher in Gurgaon. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About T.I.M.E.:
T.I.M.E. is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with T.I.M.E.!
